results.title: Madonna dodges question about Kylie Minogue collaboration
results.description: Madonna refused to confirm or deny whether Kylie Minogue features on her upcoming album Confessions II, and she did it with the kind of smirk that suggests the answer might well be yes. The two pop icons appeared together on BBC's The Graham Norton Show, airing Friday, 26 June, when...

results.title: US Britain Royal Visit
results.description: Lionel Richie postponed the two shows following a visit to the hospital during a show in St. Paul, Minnesota, on June 24.
